notes: Tyrian Vault can now update itself through Google Play — new versions download in the background and prompt you to restart. Navigation is snappier and lighter on the battery in the background, Guild Wars 2 API hiccups now show a clean message instead of raw error text, and new installs default to local time and a 12-hour clock. Tyrian Vault is in closed beta — join at medephiststudios.com/join-beta.html.
